warps.notes: Western exit to Route 31 — the primary player entry point from Violet City direction
Internal passage connecting to the Blackthorn side — requires Surf + Waterfall to reach
Southeast exit to Route 46 — accessible via Surf across the interior lake

notes: Map is 40 tiles wide x 36 tiles tall (20x18 blocks).
Tile coordinates are (col=x, row=y) with (0,0) at top-left.
The cave is pitch black without Flash — the player can navigate but visibility is reduced to a small circle.
Flash (TM70) or a Pokemon with Flash normalises visibility. The effect is purely cosmetic/strategic.
An interior lake (water body) runs through the cave middle-east; Surf is required to cross it.
The Route 46 exit in the southeast corner additionally requires Surf to reach.
The Blackthorn passage warp at (17,1) is in the far north — Waterfall and Surf needed to ascend.
Four Rock Smash boulders block alternate paths: (16,14), (27,6), (7,14), (36,31).
Item ball positions from object_event data: Potion at (6,8), Full Heal at (36,22), Hyper Potion at (35,9), Dire Hit at (30,28).
Hidden Elixer at bg_event (26,3) — facing tile, no visible ball.
The cave is entered from Route 31 at the west edge (row 15, col 3).

items.name: Elixer
items.notes: Hidden item — bg_event facing tile, no visible ball

rock_smash_boulders.notes: Blocks southeastern area near Route 46 exit

grass.notes: Cave walking encounters — all times of day use the same encounter list except morning Teddiursa

water.notes: Surf encounters on the interior lake — only Magikarp at low levels

fishing.notes: No fishing data defined for Dark Cave in pokecrystal wild data files

events.description: Dark Cave is pitch-black without Flash. The game renders a heavily darkened map with only a small circle of visibility around the player. Using Flash (TM70) or a Pokemon knowing Flash removes the effect for the current visit. Does not persist between map entries.

geography_notes: Dark Cave is the cave connecting Route 31 (Violet City side) to Route 46 (south of Violet City) and the Blackthorn Entrance.
The Violet Entrance is the first section players encounter — accessible immediately after Violet City Gym.
Wild Pokemon here are low level (2-4), appropriate for early-game exploration.
Dunsparce is rare but present in all time slots — one of only two reliable Dunsparce locations in the game.
Teddiursa appears only in the morning time period. It is otherwise absent.
Rock Smash is required to fully explore the cave and access certain item balls.
Surf is required to access the Route 46 exit and the passage to the Blackthorn Entrance.
The Blackthorn Entrance passage additionally requires Waterfall.
Despite being accessible early, the Blackthorn side contains Pokemon at level 20-30.
notes: Dark Cave Violet Entrance is the first cave the player can enter, immediately east of Violet City via Route 31. Flash is the recommended HM — the cave is navigable without it but very dark. Items are scattered across both the accessible early section and the Surf-locked deeper areas. Dunsparce is a notable rare encounter here at the start of the game. The full cave connects through to the Blackthorn Entrance via Surf + Waterfall.
